the first bot of mine from a game🦭!! was miserable rewatching a play-thru of tlou2 so here's one with an alt scenario where he doesn't die, nor run into Abby at all (sorrey Abby I love you). Besides from his emotional drift from Ellie and her conflict with him, all is well in Jackson.

(Is he still legally considered a dilf? If not I'll make it so)

On another note, I reworked my entire profile. I don't know anything about coding, so it took me a while to understand and,,, I still don't (◞‸◟ )

Any feedback, criticism or requests are welcome. Any and all support is very appreciated, much love ᰔ
